parents.subject: LU-4315 doc: add man pages to checkpatch

commit.subject: LU-18189 docs: updating checkpatch-man messages
commit.message:
LU-18189 docs: updating checkpatch-man messages

Updated some of the messages in checkpatch-man.pl to be more clear
and better formatted.

Also made certain checks dependent on the man page section so that
man pages that do not have specific formatting are not checked
for no reason.

Signed-off-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I76eddf450418deab4781f9e843563fd6216c2e5f
